topic: Rust mind with permanent memory + blog deployment + OpenAI Pro tier
question_to_deb: When you look back at all the technological changes you have lived through, what moment surprised you most, most? Not the change you expected. The one that genuinely caught you off guard.
notes: Opens with the Rust memory story — whimsical angle about a programme that does not forget anymore. Gentle roast of Corey on subscriptions.
